title: Board/Metrics view toggle selector in toolbar
description:
Add an AnimatedSelector to the toolbar that switches between the board view and the metrics view. Selecting Board slides the kanban board back into view and pushes the metrics panel away to the right. Selecting Metrics slides the metrics panel in from the right and pushes the kanban board out to the left.

Scenario: Default view is board

Given the user opens the Kanbus console for the first time
Then the board view is active
And the toggle selector shows Board as the selected option
And the kanban board is fully visible

Scenario: Switching to metrics view

Given the board view is active
When the user clicks the Metrics option in the view toggle
Then the metrics panel slides in from the right
And the kanban board animates out to the left
And the Metrics option appears selected in the toggle

Scenario: Switching back to board view

Given the metrics view is active
When the user clicks the Board option in the view toggle
Then the kanban board slides in from the right (back to its normal position)
And the metrics panel animates out to the right
And the Board option appears selected in the toggle

Scenario: Toggle uses recognizable icons

Given the user views the toolbar
Then the Board option has a grid/kanban-board icon
And the Metrics option has a bar-chart icon
And both options follow the same AnimatedSelector styling as other selectors in the toolbar

Scenario: View selection persists across reload

Given the user has switched to the metrics view
When the page is reloaded
Then the metrics view is shown again
And the toggle reflects Metrics as selected
creator: ryan.porter
